steps.title: Use equal side lengths
steps.content: Since $PQ=QR$, triangle $PQR$ is isosceles. The angles opposite those equal sides are also equal.

steps.title: Match the base angles
steps.content: The diagram shows one base angle as $24^{\circ}$, so the other base angle labeled $x^{\circ}$ also measures $24^{\circ}$. Therefore $x=24$. The answer is D.
